case_title: TARGET NATIONAL BANK VS. DORIS TRAN et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, DORIS DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-03-2011

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAN, DORIS $4,392.45 PRINCIPAL, $267.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,659.95, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK SERVED JUL-17-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, DORIS
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $267.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, DORIS
